data.body: Plan: epic 6eca-183e (Janitor Cleanup 2026-07-19) has 5 independent stories (no blocking deps): 1aa8-cdde (verifier empty-outcome rejection, code), 35d2-8cd6 (DCO sign-off doc, docs-only), 6777-5581 (ChatGPT connector docs, docs-only), b24d-a840 (plan-review hierarchy completeness, code), fe4c-315c (force bypass docs, docs-only + tests). Worktree ~/rebar-janitor-6eca branch janitor-cleanup-6eca off origin/main@d5fdbdc56. Landing method: rebar/Gerrit default (push gerrit HEAD:refs/for/main, stacked relation chain, LLM-Review+1 and Verified+1 required).
